relationship_model.master_operations.csv: Job-level ledger keyed by job_ref with supplier, region, patch, channel, engineer, status, dates, revenue, and cost. Includes unbooked requests and unresolved booked appointments.
relationship_model.channel_volume.csv: Daily region/channel aggregation derived from master_operations.csv.
relationship_model.booking_journey.csv: Weekly funnel aggregation derived from master_operations.csv.
relationship_model.financial_data.csv: Monthly region/job-type P&L aggregation derived from master_operations.csv.
relationship_model.capacity_demand.csv: Weekly patch demand from master_operations.csv joined to engineer_availability.csv capacity.
relationship_model.engineer_availability.csv: Engineer-day table whose completed jobs are assigned from master_operations.csv.
relationship_model.suppliers.csv: Supplier dimension assigned to every request in master_operations.csv by supplier_name.
